icdUsername.title: ICD Username
icdUsername.description: Login email for app.insurancecallsdirect.com (typically same as DSB CRM credentials)

scrapeDate.title: Scrape Date (single day)
scrapeDate.description: Single ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) to scrape. Pulled as a 1-day range. Defaults to today (CST).

backfillDates.title: Backfill ISO dates
backfillDates.description: Optional list of ISO dates to scrape one-at-a-time. When provided, scrapeDate is ignored. Each date emits its own dataset item so daily ib_leads_delivered values can be backfilled accurately.

agencyId.title: ICD Agency ID
agencyId.description: Agency id used in the report URL (?agency_id=...). Default 1428 = DSB.

nameAliases.title: ICD name -> ROLI canonical name map
nameAliases.description: Map of ICD agent display name -> canonical ROLI agent name. e.g. { "Drew Idahosa": "Andrew Idahosa" }. Resolved n8n-side from agent_name_aliases.

targetAgents.title: Canonical agent names (filter)
targetAgents.description: Optional whitelist of canonical ROLI agent names. When set, the actor only emits rows whose resolved canonical name is in this list. Use to suppress noise from non-DSB agents that may share the agency.

requestDelay.title: Inter-request delay (ms)
requestDelay.description: Delay between page loads to avoid rate limiting.
